results.title: US beef prices stay red-hot for summer cookouts

results.title: Lawsuit against Dorchester state's attorney dismissed, as judge says prosecutors immune
results.description: A federal judge has dismissed a lawsuit brought by a man acquitted of a 2021 Cambridge murder, ruling that Dorchester County prosecutors accused of withholding evidence are shielded by prosecutorial immunity, according to federal court documents.
